title: lindsaea mesarum
intro: Lindsaea mesarum, also known as the tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. Traditionally, the rhizome of Lindsaea mesarum has been used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea mesarum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The rhizome of Lindsaea mesarum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used to make herbal teas or tinctures.
